extortion.description: sasin.edu zoominfo.com/c/sasin/430263326 Sasin School of Management is the first internationally accredited business school in Thailand, established in 1982. It offers a range of programs including MBA, Executive MBA, DBA, and custom executive education aimed at shaping leaders for tomorrow's world. The school targets experienced professionals and aspiring leaders seeking to enhance their management skills and knowledge. Sasin is committed to inspiring, connecting, and transforming individuals for a better, smarter, and sustainable world
